name: semantic-link-direction-client-edge
doc: link_direction on a client-touching edge: a client link uses a single wg0 with fixed dial semantics (the client always dials the router via the required endpoint_host), so a direction is meaningless there and rejected (validation_edge_link_direction_client_edge). The edge otherwise satisfies every client rule (exactly one outbound edge, router target, endpoint_host matching the router's public endpoint) so the direction finding is the sole failure. AgentHeld custody with both nodes keyed keeps validation the sole failure.
